text: Natural language processing, or NLP, allows computers to understand and work with human language. One key task is text understanding, where machines analyse written words to grasp their meaning. This is useful for translation, as NLP systems can convert text from one language to another, although they may struggle with idioms. Another important application is sentiment analysis, which helps companies determine if customer feedback is positive, negative, or neutral. Finally, many modern chatbots use NLP to have conversations with people, answering questions and providing support. While not perfect, NLP continues to improve how we interact with technology.
